challenges.name: JustCTF 2025 - Babyheap
challenges.description: Simple heap challenge with UAF vulnerability. Provides alloc, edit, free, read operations.

challenges.name: Dreamhack - Toxic Malloc
challenges.description: Heap challenge with create/update/read/delete menu. Uses glibc 2.35 (safe-linking enabled).

challenges.name: Dreamhack - Cats and Dogs
challenges.description: Non-PIE heap challenge with get/see/pet/release menu for cats and dogs.
